book_row_default_rebuild_reason: Book data is outdated and must be rebuilt.
book_row_no_metadata: No metadata yet — run the pipeline to extract book details
index_books_empty_subtitle: Upload a PDF to get started
settings_apiKey_description: Configure API keys for AI pipeline features.
books_deleteDialog_body_prefix: Are you sure you want to delete
books_deleteDialog_body_suffix: ? This will remove all extracted data and cannot be undone.
pipeline_stage_extract_description: Extract text and images from each page of the PDF using AI-powered analysis.
pipeline_stage_storyboard_description: Arrange extracted content into a structured storyboard with pages, sections, and layouts.
pipeline_stage_quizzes_description: Generate comprehension quizzes and activities based on the book content.
pipeline_stage_captions_description: Create descriptive captions for images to improve accessibility.
pipeline_stage_glossary_description: Build a glossary of key terms and definitions found in the text.
pipeline_stage_text_and_speech_descripti: Translate the book content and generate audio narration.
pipeline_stage_preview_description: Package and preview the final ADT web application.
